assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended release channel with detailed explanation of its benefits including 24-month support and manual minor version upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command to add 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion with detailed explanation that it blocks node pool and minor upgrades while still allowing critical security patches on control plane

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command setting maintenance window for Sunday 2-6 AM with weekly recurrence, creating a narrow 4-hour weekend window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Creates separate node pools - 'h100-training' pool for training workloads and 'inference-pool' for inference workloads, with clear explanation of separation benefits

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Explicitly sets '--enable-autoupgrade=false' on the H100 training pool and provides detailed workflow for manual upgrades during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Provides detailed checkpointing strategy with YAML configuration showing hourly checkpoints and specific pre-upgrade workflow including checkpoint verification

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes specific section on 'Driver version coupling' with commands to create staging cluster and test CUDA compatibility, plus multi-cluster strategy for version testing pipeline

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Does not mention GPUDirect or RDMA networking compatibility requirements or version constraints specific to these technologies
